name: repo-visualization-helper
description: Repo-local helper for creating, reviewing, and polishing visualizer pages in ml-concept-visualizer.

interface.shortDescription: Build and review repo-native visualizer pages
interface.longDescription: Helps create, improve, and review standalone HTML visualizers for this repository, including educational flow, responsive canvas behavior, catalog integration, and repo consistency checks.
defaultPrompt: Use $repo-visualization-helper to add a new visualizer page to this repo.
Use $repo-visualization-helper to review a visualizer for clarity, responsiveness, and educational flow.
Use $repo-visualization-helper to update a page and keep index and checks in sync.
